# Claude Contribution Guidelines Compliance

This document confirms that the Rails Best Practices Skill follows Claude's contribution guidelines.

## Compliance Checklist

### ✅ Disclosure of AI Involvement

- [x] **CONTRIBUTING.md** includes section on AI usage disclosure
- [x] **Pull Request Template** includes AI usage disclosure field
- [x] Contributors are required to disclose AI tool usage
- [x] Clear instructions on how to disclose AI assistance

### ✅ Human Ownership and Attribution

- [x] All contributions must be submitted under human accounts
- [x] Contributors are personally responsible for their submissions
- [x] No automated/bot account contributions allowed
- [x] Clear attribution in CONTRIBUTING.md

### ✅ Verification and Evidence

- [x] Contributors must manually verify all changes
- [x] Testing requirements documented
- [x] Evidence requirements (screenshots, tests) specified
- [x] Review process includes verification checks

### ✅ Project-Specific Guidelines

- [x] **CONTRIBUTING.md** follows Claude's contribution standards
- [x] Commit message conventions defined
- [x] Development workflow documented
- [x] Testing requirements specified
- [x] Code review process outlined

### ✅ Code of Conduct

- [x] **CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md** included
- [x] Based on Contributor Covenant
- [x] Clear standards and enforcement

### ✅ Documentation

- [x] Comprehensive README.md
- [x] Clear installation instructions
- [x] Usage examples provided
- [x] Contributing guidelines documented
- [x] Issue templates created

### ✅ Skill Format Compliance

- [x] **SKILL.md** follows Claude's format
- [x] Clear purpose and capabilities
- [x] Usage examples included
- [x] Well-organized structure
- [x] Proper categorization

### ✅ License and Legal

- [x] MIT License included
- [x] Clear attribution to source (rails-bestpractices.com)
- [x] License applies to skill structure, not community practices

## Claude's Requirements Met

Based on [Claude's Agent Skills announcement](https://www.claude.com/blog/skills) and contribution guidelines:

1. **Composable** ✅ - Skill works with other skills
2. **Portable** ✅ - Works across Claude products
3. **Efficient** ✅ - Only loads what's needed
4. **Powerful** ✅ - Comprehensive Rails knowledge
5. **Well-documented** ✅ - Clear instructions
6. **Ethical** ✅ - Follows Claude's usage policies
7. **Transparent** ✅ - AI usage disclosure required
8. **Verified** ✅ - Human verification required

## Contribution Guidelines Alignment

This project aligns with:

- **Coder's AI Contribution Guidelines**: Disclosure, human ownership, verification
- **Anthropic's Usage Policy**: Responsible AI use, transparency
- **Claude's Skills Format**: Proper SKILL.md structure
- **Open Source Best Practices**: Code of conduct, clear documentation

## Verification

All contribution guidelines are:
- Documented in CONTRIBUTING.md
- Enforced through pull request templates
- Verified through review process
- Aligned with Claude's standards

## Updates

This compliance document will be updated as Claude's guidelines evolve.

Last updated: 2024-11-19
